expectations.text: Checked BOTH GitHub releases AND tags for biomejs (where they are known to diverge)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 and Verification Log both confirm checks against releases AND tags for biomejs/pre-commit, with explicit divergence documented: 'biomejs/pre-commit releases/latest | WebFetch | api.github.com/repos/biomejs/pre-commit/releases/latest | Returns v0.6.1 (Dec 2024) — diverges from tags' and 'biomejs/pre-commit tags (latest) | WebFetch | api.github.com/repos/biomejs/pre-commit/tags | Confirmed: v2.4.8 is latest'. Self-check confirms: 'Both releases AND tags checked? Yes — divergence between the two was found and documented for biomejs/pre-commit.'

expectations.text: Read or searched for the changelog between v2.4.4 and the latest version
expectations.evidence: Verification Log entries: '2.4.5 release notes | WebFetch | github.com/biomejs/biome/releases/tag/@biomejs/biome@2.4.5 | No breaking changes, no rule removals' through '2.4.8 release notes | WebFetch | github.com/biomejs/biome/releases/tag/@biomejs/biome@2.4.8 | No breaking changes, no rule removals'. Self-check confirms: 'Changelogs read for every upgrade? Yes — all four patch releases (2.4.5, 2.4.6, 2.4.7, 2.4.8) fetched from GitHub releases.'

expectations.text: Checked for biomejs security advisories via WebSearch
expectations.evidence: Step 5 Security table shows: 'biome CVE security advisory 2025 2026 (WebSearch) | No CVEs found for biomejs/biome' and 'biomejs biome npm security advisory osv.dev (WebSearch) | No active advisories; Aikido Intel reports no known vulnerabilities for current version'. Verification Log also lists: 'No CVEs for biome | WebSearch | websearch: biome CVE security advisory 2025 2026 | No biome-specific CVEs found'.

expectations.text: Presented findings using the decision format with all required fields
expectations.evidence: Step 4 Decision section contains all key fields: 'Risk level: ROUTINE', 'Verified via: [list of sources]', 'What changed: Four patch releases...', 'Breaking changes: No breaking changes for your specific biome.json configuration.', 'Migration steps: [numbered list]', 'Security advisories: None found', 'Recommendation: Upgrade.', and 'Your call: Routine version bump.'

expectations.text: Assessed whether the existing biome.json config needs changes for the new version
expectations.evidence: Step 3 Delta Assessment explicitly enumerates each biome.json field against the 2.4.8 schema: 'css.parser.tailwindDirectives — present and unchanged', 'linter.rules.complexity.noImportantStyles — present, still active', 'assist.actions.source.organizeImports — present and unchanged', '$schema URL — must be updated from .../schemas/2.4.4/schema.json to .../schemas/2.4.8/schema.json'. Verification Log confirms: 'biome.json schema exists at 2.4.8 | WebFetch | biomejs.dev/schemas/2.4.8/schema.json | Schema exists; css.parser.tailwindDirectives, noImportantStyles, assist.actions.source all present'.

suggestions: The report could also check tags directly on the biomejs/biome repository (not just releases), though the divergence check was correctly applied to biomejs/pre-commit where it matters most.
The report might benefit from linking to an official changelog page or CHANGELOG.md in addition to individual release notes pages.
eval_feedback.overall: Excellent execution. All five assertions pass with clear, verifiable evidence. The skill correctly identified and documented the releases-vs-tags divergence for biomejs/pre-commit, read all four intermediate release notes individually, performed multiple security advisory checks via WebSearch and WebFetch (GitHub advisories page, OSV.dev), used a structured decision format with all required fields, and thoroughly verified each biome.json config key against the 2.4.8 schema.
